final:
// // This module outputs HIGH when at least one of the following conditions is met: a AND NOT d, b AND NOT c, OR c AND d AND (a OR b)
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    input d,
    output out  );assign out = ~d&~a | ~c&~b | c&d&(a|b);
endmodule
